tasks.label: dev
tasks.detail: Astro dev server on :4321 (Vite HMR for .mdx / .astro)

tasks.label: check
tasks.detail: astro check + tsc --noEmit on the Node server

tasks.label: start (prod-like local)
tasks.detail: Build then run the compiled Node server on :8080 — mirrors what ships
tasks.command: GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD) npm run start

tasks.label: container: build
tasks.detail: podman build of the prod image, tagged :local + :<short-sha>
tasks.command: SHA=$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD); podman build --build-arg GIT_SHA=$SHA -t filipkunc-com:local -t filipkunc-com:$SHA .

tasks.label: container: run
tasks.detail: Run the prod image locally on :8080 (build first if needed)
tasks.command: podman rm -f filipkunc-test 2>/dev/null; podman run --rm -p 8080:8080 --name filipkunc-test filipkunc-com:local

tasks.label: container: stop
tasks.detail: Stop the local container started by 'container: run'

tasks.label: meshmaker: rebuild & sync
tasks.detail: Build MeshMakerWeb with base=/meshmaker/ and rsync into public/meshmaker/
